explanation: Flute, Clarinet, Oboe, and Bassoon are all instruments belonging to the woodwind family. The Trumpet is a brass instrument.

category: Seven Wonders of the Ancient World
explanation: The Great Pyramid of Giza, Lighthouse of Alexandria, Colossus of Rhodes, and Statue of Zeus at Olympia are all recognized as four of the original Seven Wonders of the Ancient World. The Taj Mahal, while a famous architectural wonder, is not included in the ancient list.
Rapid, Swift, Quick, and Hasty are all adjectives used to describe something happening or moving at a high speed. Brief describes a short duration of time, not the speed at which something occurs.
